data.summary: Insufficient evidence to validate the requirement regarding minimum remaining-validity days.
data.assessment: The exploratory step requires validation of the requirement for 'items with minimum remaining-validity days', but the evidence provided does not include any specific data or checks that confirm the existence or validity of such items. The linked use case mentions the need for these items, yet no concrete API reads or persisted state checks were performed to validate this requirement. Therefore, the evidence is insufficient to assert a hard requirement failure, leading to a blocked status.
gaps: No evidence of items with minimum remaining-validity days.

deterministicFollowUps.title: Add deterministic evidence contract
deterministicFollowUps.assertion: Define concrete endpoint calls and assertions that directly verify this requirement.
